subcodes.first_line: O Ali! The dewdrops of divine Revelation continually stream forth from the leaves of the celestial Lote-Tree at every moment, yet most remain bereft thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی رشحات وحی از اوراق سدره منتهی در کل احیان ترشح مینماید ولکن اکثری از او
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @wisdom [hikmat]
